required_preferences.fact: Temporarily avoids gardening activities — instead, pursues indoor hobbies such as painting or reading on weekends during injury recovery

supersedes.fact: Gardens in the backyard every weekend when weather allows — avoids indoor hobbies during spring and summer

required_preferences.fact: Refuses all evening social invitations and now blocks off weeknight hours exclusively for transporting his son to and from the ADHD program, sharing this duty with his wife

supersedes.fact: Refuses all evening social invitations except for urgent family needs to prioritize caring for his mother after work

required_preferences.fact: Coordinates son’s school and therapy appointments exclusively via shared digital calendar with wife — never relies on paper notes
Delegates recruitment tasks to junior staff but handles conflict resolution personally
Prefers texting family about minor logistics — only calls for urgent matters
Uses hotel gyms or pool facilities for exercise whenever traveling for work, supplementing his regular routine

persona: A mid-level HR manager at a regional manufacturing company
